news.headline: President accuses China of breaking trade deal with US, sparking tensions between the two countries.

news.summary: Angeles Investors, a prominent investment group based in Mountain View, California, has revealed the 2025 Angeles 100 list. This list recognizes the best ventures in America and is a celebration of Latino growth. Angeles Investors aims to find, fund, and support these top ventures, showcasing the diverse talent and opportunities within the community. This year's Angeles 100 highlights outstanding entrepreneurial achievements and showcases the top companies making an impact in the business world.
news.headline: Angeles Investors reveals 2025 Angeles 100 honorees at Silicon Valley summit. Celebrating top ventures.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Wolfson BTR, the state's inaugural large-scale Build-to-Rent (BTR) developer, marked a significant milestone with a ribbon-cutting event on April 22, 2025. The celebration honored the completion of the initial phase of the Encanto Isla townhome community. Alongside collaborators Paragon Group and contractor First Florida, Wolfson introduced the first set of 214 new BTR townhomes within two adjacent communities. These properties will be overseen by Greystar, operating under its Summerwe brand.
news.headline: Wolfson BTR opens 214-unit Build-to-Rent community in Orlando, FL. Ribbon cutting held on April 22, 2025.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on May 30, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has announced the launch of Bybit Earnival, a rewards program for Bybit Earn users. The program will run for four weeks until June 22. Eligible Bybit users can participate in the rewards program by signing up...
news.headline: Bybit launches 4-week rewards program, Bybit Earnival, for users until June 22, 2025. World's 2nd largest crypto exchange.

news.summary: A company headquartered in Minnesota has successfully installed approximately 7 gigawatts of power in the central region of the United States. This achievement comes after Brookfield Asset Management and its institutional partners acquired National Grid Renewables. The acquisition was announced on May 30, 2025, in Minneapolis.
news.headline: National Grid Renewables, now Geronimo Power, to progress under Brookfield ownership with 7 GW deployment in America.

news.summary: Shares of energy company EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE: EOG) are seeing a decrease in premarket trading on Friday following the announcement of their acquisition of Encino Acquisition Partners (EAP) for a total of $5.6 billion, encompassing EAP's net debt. The payment for this acquisition, to be made to the sellers CPP and Encino Energy, will involve a combination of cash and debt, with $3.5 billion in new debt and $2.1 billion in cash. The transaction is anticipated to finalize in the latter part of 2025, pending clearance under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Act. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: EOG Resources acquires Encino Acquisition Partners for $5.6 billion, plans to pay with $3.5 billion debt and $2.1 billion cash.

news.summary: PharmAla has issued a cautionary statement to the public, clarifying that it does not distribute MDMA to individuals. The company emphasized the need for vigilance against counterfeit items and illicit sales occurring online. Consumers are advised to stay cautious and avoid purchasing unauthorized products.
news.headline: PharmAla Biotech warns public about fake products claiming to be from PharmAla, does not sell MDMA to consumers.

news.summary: On May 28, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a renowned global shipping firm focusing on the ownership and bareboat charter-in of dry bulk vessels, conducted its Annual Shareholders Meeting. This event was held virtually through the Internet, overseen by the respected inspector of the Meeting, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. The Meeting marked a significant milestone for the Company, with shareholders participating remotely in line with current technology trends.
news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. reports 2025 Annual Meeting results held virtually on May 28, 2025. Inspector: Broadridge Financial Solutions.

news.summary: In College Park, Maryland, on May 30, 2025, the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business unveiled its latest Summer Reading List for Business Leaders. The selection includes recommendations from faculty members covering a range of topics such as investing, neuroscience, human connection, and others. One highlight is a novel that draws inspiration from a radio. This annual reading list serves as a valuable resource for business leaders seeking to broaden their knowledge and insights.

news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Electronic Arts Inc. is launching F1® 25, the official game of the 2025 FIA Formula One World Championship™. It is now available on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC. Players can immerse themselves in the world of Formula One through various features such as My Team 2.0 where they can become a team owner, and the beloved story mode, Braking Point, which brings the emotional rollercoaster of competing at the front of the grid. Electronic Arts Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EA.
news.headline: EA releases F1® 25 game, official of 2025 FIA Formula One World Championship™ on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, PC today. My Team 2.0 and Braking Point modes available for players.

news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) revealed details about the Proof of Concept (PoC) demonstrations set for Fiber Connect 2025 on June 1-4 in Nashville, Tenn. The FBA, in collaboration with the Broadband Forum, will host the PoC Showcase featuring six PoCs showcasing innovations from 11 companies. These demonstrations have the potential to revolutionize the Connected Home and/or broadband subscriber experience. Each PoC will utilize one of three Broadband Forum specifications for fib...
news.headline: Fiber Connect 2025 to showcase 6 PoC demos in collaboration with 11 companies transforming Connected Home/broadband experience.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Artera unveiled news at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. They showcased two new abstracts, with one selected for Best of ASCO 2025, a prestigious recognition for studies with significant influence on cancer care. The oral presentation highlights the initial validated MMAI algorithm. The developer specializes in multimodal artificial intelligence (MMAI) cancer tests, indicating promising advancements in cancer prognostic and predictive technologies.
news.headline: Artera to showcase validated MMAI platform at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting, selected for Best of ASCO with two abstracts.

news.summary: Based in Dallas, Emburse, known for its cutting-edge travel and expense management solutions for progressive companies, has received a Bronze Stevie® Award for being the Most Innovative Tech Company of the Year in the category of Up to 2,500 Employees at the 23rd Annual American Business Awards®. This accolade highlights Emburse's dedication to promoting innovation-centered culture and its determination to revolutionize Expense Intelligence for finance teams. Led by the organization's visionary leadership, Emburse sets a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: Emburse wins Bronze Stevie® Award for Most Innovative Tech Company of the Year; category for up to 2,500 employees.

news.summary: In Toronto, Achievers, a leading recognition and reward software globally, revealed today that it has received 16 badges in various categories in G2’s Spring 2025 Grid® Reports. These accomplishments highlight Achievers’ exceptional capacity to enhance employee engagement and retention, drive cultural and business evolution through behavior modification, and provide tangible business outcomes. Achievers is recognized for its top-notch recognition platform based on workforce science principles.
news.headline: Achievers earns 16 accolades in G2's Spring 2025 reports, underscoring its impact on boosting engagement and business results.

news.summary: A partnership between The Standard and EvolutionIQ has been strengthened in Portland, Oregon. The leading financial protection provider will now utilize EvolutionIQ's AI-powered claims guidance platform across all of its disability insurance products. This decision comes after a successful trial period in 2024. Through this collaboration, The Standard's claims experts will be equipped with data insights to streamline processes and reduce administrative burdens.
news.headline: The Standard and EvolutionIQ partnership enhances disability claims with AI technology, expanding across all products in 2024.

news.summary: Atropos Health, based in Palo Alto, California, has unveiled new enhancements to their Oncology solutions, showcasing their expertise in producing tailored real-world evidence (RWE) from real-world clinical data. The company has introduced crucial personnel and product upgrades to bolster their offerings in the field. One of the significant developments is the integration of Ontada's community oncology real-world data (RWD) into the Oncology MultiModal Network within the Atropos Evidence™ Network. This move signals a substantial expansion of the Atropos Evidence Network. Atropos Health continues to solidify its position as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Atropos Health focuses on advancements in Oncology with new personnel and products, expanding Oncology MultiModal Network.

news.summary: NWN has strengthened its dedication to healthcare innovation by becoming the Title Sponsor for the 29th Annual Penn Medicine Princeton Health Golf Outing held in Boston and Philadelphia.
news.headline: NWN sponsors 29th Annual Penn Medicine Princeton Health Golf Outing, deepening healthcare innovation commitment.

news.summary: A major event in the fiber broadband industry, Fiber Connect 2025, is set to take place from June 1-4 at the Gaylord Opryland Resort & Convention Center in Nashville, Tennessee. Organized by the Fiber Broadband Association, the conference will feature influential keynote speakers and executive programming. It aims to bring together top executives, policymakers, and innovators in the field to discuss the key issues and possibilities impacting the digital infrastructure landscape in the United States and globally. One of the highlights of the event is the C-Suite Forum, where industry leaders will lead discussions and share insights on leading trends.
news.headline: Fiber Connect 2025 at Nashville to host executives and industry leaders, discussing digital infrastructure future.

news.summary: In Utah, Domo revealed that Kaufman Rossin, the leading independent CPA and advisory firm in Florida and among the top 50 accounting firms in the U.S., has adopted Domo’s AI and data products platform. This move aims to streamline data sources, enhance workflow automation, and improve resource management. Established in 1962 to cater to Florida businesses, Kaufman Rossin offers audit and tax services, along with business, risk, and forensic advisory services. The firm employs the latest technologies to optimize its operations and service offerings, marking a significant shift towards digital transformation within the accounting industry.
news.headline: Kaufman Rossin boosts productivity using Domo's AI platform. Largest FL CPA firm streamlines data, workflows & resource allocation.

news.summary: In Chicago, Massive Bio is presenting its AI oncology solutions and clinical trial technology at ASCO25. The company is emphasizing its utilization of real-world data and patient-matching innovations during the event.
news.headline: Massive Bio to present AI-driven oncology innovations at ASCO25 in Chicago, focusing on real-world data and patient-matching tech.

news.summary: Wilsonville, Oregon-based ESS Tech, Inc. (NYSE: GWH), a prominent producer of iron flow long-duration energy storage (LDES) systems for large-scale commercial and utility use, shared a business update. The company emphasized their commitment to advancing their strategic plan centered on the Energy Base product. Earlier, ESS had mentioned the potential necessity of making workforce adjustments if capital wasn't secured to steer clear of certain issues. Today, the company highlighted active measures in line with their strategic objectives.
news.headline: ESS is continuing its strategic plan with the Energy Base product, focusing on iron flow long-duration energy storage systems.

news.summary: A recent report on the Humanoid Robots Market highlights industry trends and offers global forecasts up to 2035. This comprehensive analysis includes segmentation by type of component, areas of application, type of motion, technology, functionality, end user, company size, business model, and key geographical regions. The market is anticipated to see substantial growth, with projections indicating an increase from USD 2.98 billion in 2025 to a striking USD 243.40 billion by 2035, representing a remarkable CAGR of 49.2%.
news.headline: Global humanoid robots market set to soar from $2.98B in 2025 to $243.4B by 2035, driven by AI and automation.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC revealed that its board of directors has chosen Gary B. Smith, the President and CEO of Ciena, as a Class I director nominee for the upcoming Annual Meeting. Planet Labs is recognized for offering daily Earth data and insights, with its stock trading under NYSE ticker PL. Co-Founder and CEO, Will Marshall, emphasized Smith's significant experience in technology, operations, and sales, underscoring his potential contribution to the expansion of Planet as a data platform enterprise. This move signifies Planet Labs' strategic approach to enhancing its leadership team, highlighting Smith as a valuable addition.
news.headline: Gary B. Smith nominated to join Planet Labs board, valued for expertise.textAlign=centerRevenue:N/A,Class I Director:Gary B. Smith

news.summary: A collaboration between HAAS Alert and Mitsubishi Electric Automotive America, Inc. has been disclosed in Chicage and Northville, Mich. This partnership aims to pioneer the future of in-vehicle technology.
news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric partners with HAAS Alert for in-vehicle technology advancement. #AutomotiveTech #SafetyCloud

news.summary: Grindr, a popular dating app, has announced the global release of its new feature "Right Now," a real-time feed for immediate and purpose-driven connections. The launch comes in response to high demand from users.
news.headline: Grindr's "Right Now" feature goes global, offering real-time connections after high demand.

news.summary: Summit Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: SMMT) disclosed top-line findings from the Phase 3 HARMONi trial. The study evaluated ivonescimab plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy versus placebo plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy for patients with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR)-mutated, locally advanced or metastatic non-squamous non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who had progression after receiving a 3rd generation EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor (TKI). The trial successfully met the primary endpoint of progression-free survival (PFS) and displayed a positive trend in the other primary endpoint, overall survival (OS). During the primary data analysis, ivonescimab combined with chemotherapy exhibited a significant and clinically relevant enhancement in progression-free survival, depicting a hazard ratio of 0.52. Additionally, ivonescimab, when combined with chemotherapy, indicated a positive trend in OS in the primary analysis. Find the complete story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Summit Therapeutics' lung cancer study of Ivonescimab missed overall survival endpoint, showed improvement in progression-free survival with hazard ratio of 0.52.

news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) and H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES) disclosed the conclusion of a tender offer to swap each outstanding H&E common stock for $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock on May 30, 2025. This offer, part of the merger agreement inked on February 19, 2025, included a total Offer Price without interest. The agreement involved Herc, HR Merger Sub Inc., and H&E, stating the terms of the exchange of shares.
news.headline: Herc Holdings and H&E Equipment Services tender offer to acquire H&E Services shares expires; offering $78.75 in cash per share.

news.summary: Lakeland Fire + Safety will be hosting a conference call to discuss their financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. The call is scheduled for Monday, June 9, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. This meeting is expected to provide insights into the company's performance and financial standing during this period. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in the call to gain a better understanding of Lakeland Fire + Safety's financial health and future prospects.
news.headline: Lakeland Fire + Safety holding Q1 2026 financial results conference call on June 9, 2025, 4:30 pm ET.

news.summary: In Phoenix on May 30, 2025, Global Water Resources, Inc. announced a monthly cash dividend of $0.02533 per common share under its dividend policy. This amounts to an annual dividend rate of $0.30396 per share. Global Water Resources, Inc. operates as a pure-play water resource management company and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GWRS.
news.headline: Global Water Resources declares monthly cash dividend of $0.02533 per common share ($0.30396 annually).

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has increased by 0.5% in the last quarter, reaching a total of 7.2%. This equates to approximately 1.4 million individuals currently unemployed. Additionally, the inflation rate has also seen a rise of 1.8% in the same period. Experts attribute these concerning trends to the ongoing economic challenges faced by the country. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and implementing measures to address these issues.
news.headline: AITX reports record-breaking gross profit and revenue in FY 2025 10-K.

news.summary: In Yokneam Illit, Israel, on May 30, 2025, Wearable Devices Ltd. revealed that the United States Patent and Trademark Office has approved an extension of its patent, "Gesture and Voice-Controlled Interface Device." This patent reinforces the company's position in innovating touchless sensing wearables powered by artificial intelligence. Wearable Devices, listed on Nasdaq as WLDS and WLDSW, focuses on enhancing human-device interactions for future digital environments.
news.headline: Wearable Devices receives US patent for gesture control, enhancing AI-powered touchless sensing wearables.

news.summary: Big Lots! is scheduled to finish its reopening phase on June 5 in Henderson, North Carolina. The company has received significant customer support, which has led to plans for further expansion. The exact number of new locations and jobs created due to this growth has not been disclosed.

The conference is anticipated to have significant implications as it involves a discussion with key executives in the healthcare field. Abeona Therapeutics Inc., listed on Nasdaq as ABEO, is expected to share important insights during this event. This news was disclosed on May 30, 2025, and is highly relevant for investors and individuals in the healthcare sector.

news.summary: GrabAGun, based in Coppell, Texas, has recently announced a partnership with Compatio to introduce a groundbreaking digital solution for product customization. This collaboration will offer customers an industry-first experience through advanced digital tools. This initiative is set to revolutionize the customization process for consumers. Keep an eye out for updates on this innovative partnership.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was confirmed that the unemployment rate decreased to 4.3%, with the creation of 250,000 new jobs. The stock market saw a significant rise, with the S&P 500 index reaching a record high of 4,400 points. Additionally, the GDP growth for the second quarter was revised to 6.5%, indicating a strong economic recovery. Experts predict further improvements in the coming months.

news.summary: A program initiated in Portland, Maine by Groups aims to assist individuals with opioid use disorder in quitting tobacco. The pilot has demonstrated promising results with substantial improvements in both engagement and behavior change among participants.

news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) unveiled its latest brand, Unscripted by Hyatt, as part of its expanding Essentials series. Geared towards travelers who prioritize spontaneity over routines, this new brand offers a unique collection-style experience where each location maintains its individuality and local charm while upholding Hyatt's renowned quality and service standards. Positioned in the upscale market segment, Unscripted by Hyatt is set to provide a fresh approach to hospitality.
news.headline: Hyatt introduces new brand Unscripted by Hyatt targeting 'Essentials' portfolio, offering flexible upscale stays.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Processa Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCSA) shared that three abstracts have been approved for presentation at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting occurring from May 30 to June 3, 2025, in Chicago, Illinois. The abstracts will feature Processa’s advancements in Next Generation Cancer (NGC) drug candidates, specifically highlighting PCS6422 (NGC-Cap) and PCS11T (NGC-Iri) in preclinical and clinical stages. This clinical-stage pharmaceutical company is dedicated to enhancing the efficacy and safety of cancer treatments. The event will take place at McCormick Place with various stakeholders in attendance.
news.headline: Processa Pharmaceuticals to present 3 abstracts at ASCO Annual Meeting focusing on cancer therapies, including NGC drug candidates.
